title: Valentine flow: photo gallery section + proposal step with playful No + celebration on Yes

requirements.summary: Add a dedicated photos section titled "face of my heart" into the Valentine flow and render the 3 uploaded photos responsively.
acceptanceCriteria: A new photos section exists in the Valentine UI flow and is reachable by normal progression (or clearly placed on the page) without breaking the existing intro/letter/message/final experience.
The photos section heading text matches exactly: "face of my heart".
The three uploaded images are rendered in the section in a responsive layout (mobile and desktop).
Images load from static frontend assets (not via backend calls).

file_operations.description: Create a dedicated PhotosSection component that renders the section heading exactly "face of my heart" and displays the three static images in a responsive grid with appropriate object-fit and accessibility attributes.

Extend the existing step-based flow to include a new photos step and render PhotosSection as part of the normal progression without breaking the intro/letter/messages/final experience (ensure the step transition reaches the new photos section).
Update the page-level step state union/type to include the new photos step and ensure the flow remains reachable and correctly wired through MessageRevealFlow.

requirements.summary: Add the 3 uploaded images as static public assets and reference them via stable paths from the photos section.
acceptanceCriteria: The following files exist under the frontend public static assets and are used by the UI: Snapchat-374559267.jpg, Snapchat-2137308291.jpg, Snapchat-1819211754.jpg.
No build-time or runtime errors occur due to missing image files.
Images are displayed with correct orientation/fit (no unintended stretching), and include basic accessibility attributes (e.g., non-empty alt text or intentionally empty alt if purely decorative).

file_operations.description: Add the uploaded image file as a static public asset at a stable path for UI usage.
Add the uploaded image file as a static public asset at a stable path for UI usage.
Add the uploaded image file as a static public asset at a stable path for UI usage.
Reference the images using stable public paths (from frontend/public/assets) and ensure images use non-stretching fit (e.g., cover/contain) and include appropriate alt text.

requirements.summary: Add a new final proposal page/step showing the exact proposal text and Yes/No options at the end of the Valentine flow.
acceptanceCriteria: After completing the existing flow, the user reaches a final proposal page/step.
The proposal text is displayed exactly as provided: "will you be my valentine my rasmalai😍🫶".

file_operations.description: Create a ProposalStep component that displays the exact text "will you be my valentine my rasmalai😍🫶" and presents two visible options/buttons: "Yes" and "No".
Add a clear progression action (e.g., a continue button) that advances from the existing final greeting card to the new proposal step without removing or breaking existing restart/share behavior.
Wire the new proposal step as the last step in the flow so that, after the existing flow completes (including the final greeting card), the user reaches ProposalStep.
Update the step state union/type to include the new proposal step and ensure it is reachable at the end of the flow.

requirements.summary: Make the "No" option effectively unpressable by adding a playful run-away interaction on hover/click/touch.
acceptanceCriteria: Attempting to interact with the "No" button (mouse hover, click, or touch) causes the button to move away so it cannot be easily pressed.
The "No" button does not trigger any navigation or success action.
The behavior works on both desktop (mouse) and mobile (touch) without causing layout breaks or scrolling the page unexpectedly.

file_operations.description: Implement a run-away "No" button: use a bounded container with relative positioning and move the "No" button to a new safe position on hover, pointer down, and touch start; ensure it does not trigger navigation/success and avoids unexpected scrolling/layout shifts.
Add any minimal supporting utility animations or classes needed for smooth "No" button motion (keep changes within existing global stylesheet entry point and avoid modifying immutable ui components).

requirements.summary: On "Yes", trigger flowers falling from the top, hearts rising from the bottom, and show a popup with the exact success message.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking "Yes" triggers simultaneous animations: flowers falling from the top and hearts rising from the bottom.
A popup/modal appears containing exactly: "I knew you love me so much🥰🫶".
The celebration visuals do not block the popup readability and can be dismissed or naturally conclude without requiring a page refresh.
The interaction does not break the existing restart/share functionality elsewhere in the app (if still present).

file_operations.description: When "Yes" is pressed, trigger celebratory overlay effects (flowers falling from top and hearts rising from bottom) and show a readable popup/modal containing exactly "I knew you love me so much🥰🫶"; allow dismissal and/or automatic conclusion without refresh, and keep existing restart/share elsewhere unaffected.

Create a reusable CelebrationOverlay component that renders animated flowers (top-to-bottom) and hearts (bottom-to-top) using CSS animations and pointer-events disabled so it does not interfere with the popup.
Create a simple popup/modal component used by ProposalStep to display the exact message "I knew you love me so much🥰🫶" and provide a clear close/dismiss action.
Add keyframes/classes for the falling-flowers and rising-hearts animations and any needed overlay/popup layering to ensure effects do not block popup readability.
